description_long: This object consists of a classic beige fax machine setup, featuring a CRT monitor, a rectangular main unit with a disk drive, and a large, boxy printer or fax output device. The main unit has a front panel with a disk drive slot, ventilation holes, and a power button, while the CRT monitor sits atop it with a thick frame and a slightly curved screen. The printer/fax component is attached to the right, with a prominent paper tray at the back and an output slot at the front, designed to handle standard letter-sized paper. The surfaces are smooth and matte, with subtle panel lines and vent details, and the overall build is robust and utilitarian. The color scheme is a uniform light gray, typical of office electronics from the late 20th century. No visible numeric keypad or telephone handset is present, and the control panel appears minimalistic.
description: A classic beige fax machine setup with a CRT monitor, main unit, and large printer/fax component, featuring smooth matte surfaces and a utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the CRT monitor, main unit with disk drive, and the printer/fax with its output tray extended.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the CRT monitor and the printer/fax, with the paper tray visible at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ventilation grilles on the main unit and the back of the printer/fax, including the upright paper tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the CRT monitor's profile and the side of the main unit, with minimal detail on the printer/fax.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is minimal, with a few buttons and a disk drive slot located on the front face of the main unit. There are no visible display screens or indicator lights, and controls are grouped together on the lower right of the main unit.
attribute_paper_tray_design: The paper tray is located at the rear of the printer/fax component, oriented vertically, and appears to be able to hold a moderate stack of paper. It features two upright guides but no visible cover.
attribute_output_slot_location: The output slot is positioned at the front center of the printer/fax component, with a flat tray extending outward to catch printed or faxed paper.
attribute_handset_attachment: No telephone handset is present or visibly attached to the object.
